nasb.text: When I scatter them among the peoples, They will remember Me in far countries, And they with their children will live and come back.

esv.text: Though I scattered them among the nations, yet in far countries they shall remember me, and with their children they shall live and return.

cnv.text: 雖然我把他們散播在萬民中， 他們仍要在遠方記念我； 他們與他們的子孫都要存活，並且歸回。

ccb.text: 虽然我把他们分散到列国， 他们必在远方想起我， 他们及其子女必得以幸存， 并且回到故土。
